scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every documented Capsule v2 endpoint is enumerated below, covered_by a stream/write action or excluded with a specific reason. Core CRM entities (parties, opportunities, kases/cases, tasks) now have full CRUD write coverage in addition to their existing read streams; account-configuration list endpoints (tags, custom field definitions, teams, pipelines, milestones, lost reasons, task categories, boards, stages) are new read streams. Detail/show-by-id endpoints are excluded as duplicate_of their list counterpart (the dialect has no per-id detail-stream primitive distinct from a list read); search/deleted/embed sub-endpoints, the ad hoc query filter, entries/history, tracks, webhooks, activity types, goals, and internationalization reference data are out of scope for this wave.

excluded.reason: single-party detail is a subset of the parties list stream; the dialect has no per-id detail-stream primitive distinct from list
multi-party show-by-ids is a subset of the parties list stream
per-organisation employee sub-listing; not a legacy-parity stream and no fan_out config surface declared for it in this wave
tombstone/deleted-records feed has no corresponding schema-projected read shape declared in this wave
ad hoc free-text search is a query-time operation, not a catalog stream; no search capability is declared in metadata.json
per-party opportunity listing is a filtered subset of the opportunities list stream

updates another user's account preferences/permissions; an account-administration mutation outside this connector's CRM-record write scope
